title: Glen Johnson
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Glen Johnson''' was the penciller and layout artist for the ''Star Wars 3-D'' anniversary special published by [[Blackthorne Publishing]]. Earlier comic artists such as [[Carmine Infantino]] took great liberties with the style and feel of the Star Wars universe, but Johnson presented a more authentic tone for the mythos, by depicting characters that more closely resembled their on-screen movie counterparts.

==Star Wars bibliography==
*''[[Star Wars 3-D 1]]''
*[[Star Wars 3-D 2|''Star Wars 3-D'' 2]]
